Title: WA Discussion Group: Risk

Event_Description: Governance Institute of Australia are hosting International Women’s Day Breakfast Darwin 2026 in-person focused on celebrating gender equality and sharing insights from Jo Seiler and industry leaders.

Event_Description: AICD (Australian Institute of Company Directors) are hosting the Hunter Directors’ Briefing: Cultivating Ethical Culture in the Boardroom in-person in Newcastle, focusing on ethical decision-making, governance, and cultivating accountability, transparency, and trust at the top.

Event_Description: AICD are hosting Brisbane Directors’ Briefing: Boardroom Culture & Organisational Impact in-person focused on how board culture influences performance, healthy board dynamics, and the board’s role in setting the tone for the whole organisation.
